title: Congress MLA Vinay Kulkarni, 16 others sentenced to life imprisonment for 2016 murder of BJP leader in Dharwad
description: Vinay Kulkarni, elected to the Legislative Assembly from the Dharwad constituency, was named as prime accused in the murder of Yogeshgouda Goudar, a 26-year-old BJP zilla panchayat member, in Dharwad in 2016
